content: At the time it was an analog system. Reel to reel tapes containing the countdown process and I was the 'computer' operator in touch with the crew manning the missiles and power station outside of my enclosed box on the back of a truck via audio communication. Several years later I jobbed for an American programmer while I was a student in Munich. He was writing ground-breaking fiber-optics  software (we call it coding these days I guess) for Siemens which was HQ'd I Munich.
